info.name: ASB Module API Collection
info.description: Comprehensive API collection for ASB (Analisis Standar Biaya) module including all endpoints for ASB management, verification, and related entities. Note: idOpd is automatically extracted from UserContext (JWT token), so it should not be included in request body.

variable.description: Base URL for the API server
JWT access token obtained from login
API prefix (api/dev/v1 for development, api/v1 for production)

item.name: ASB Query Endpoints

request.description: Get all ASB with pagination and optional filters. OPD users only see their own data. Requires OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, or SUPERADMIN role.
Get a specific ASB by ID with all relations. OPD users can only see their own data. Requires OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, or SUPERADMIN role.

item.name: Get ASB by Month and Year

request.description: Get ASB count grouped by date for a specific month and year. OPD users only see their own data. Requires OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, or SUPERADMIN role.

item.name: Get ASB by Month Year Status

request.description: Get ASB status summary for a specific month and year. OPD users only see their own data. Requires OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, or SUPERADMIN role.
Get ASB analytics data with optional month and year filters. OPD users only see their own data. Requires OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, or SUPERADMIN role.
Get reject information for a specific ASB. OPD users can only see their own data. Requires OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, or SUPERADMIN role.

item.description: Query endpoints for retrieving ASB information - All require OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, or SUPERADMIN role

item.name: ASB Management (OPD, ADMIN, SUPERADMIN)

request.description:
Create a new ASB entry (status will be set to 1). Requires OPD, ADMIN, or SUPERADMIN role.

**Required Fields:**
- `tahunAnggaran` (number): Budget year
- `namaAsb` (string): ASB name
- `alamat` (string): Address
- `totalLantai` (number): Total floors (minimum 1)
- `idAsbTipeBangunan` (number): Building type ID
- `idKabkota` (number): City/regency ID
- `jumlahKontraktor` (number): Number of contractors
- `idAsbJenis` (number): ASB jenis ID

**Optional Fields:**
- `luasTanah` (number): Land area
- `idKecamatan` (number): District ID
- `idKelurahan` (number): Sub-district ID
- `idOpd` (number): OPD ID (for ADMIN/SUPERADMIN only)
- `idAsbStatus` (number): ASB status ID (internal use)

Update an existing ASB index (status will be set to 1). Requires OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, or SUPERADMIN role.

**Required Fields:**
- `id` (number): ASB ID
- `tahunAnggaran` (number): Budget year
- `namaAsb` (string): ASB name
- `alamat` (string): Address
- `totalLantai` (number): Total floors (minimum 1)
- `idAsbTipeBangunan` (number): Building type ID
- `idKabkota` (number): City/regency ID
- `jumlahKontraktor` (number): Number of contractors
- `idAsbJenis` (number): ASB jenis ID

**Optional Fields:**
- `luasTanah` (number): Land area
- `idKecamatan` (number): District ID
- `idKelurahan` (number): Sub-district ID
- `idOpd` (number): OPD ID (for ADMIN/SUPERADMIN only)
- `idAsbStatus` (number): ASB status ID (internal use)

Delete an ASB and all related documents. OPD users can only delete their own data. Requires OPD, ADMIN, or SUPERADMIN role.

**Required Fields:**
- `id_asb` (number): ID of the ASB to delete

Store floor (lantai) details for ASB. Updates status to 2. OPD users can only update their own data. Requires OPD, ADMIN, or SUPERADMIN role.

**Required Fields:**
- `id_asb` (number): ASB ID
- `luas_lantai` (number[]): Array of floor areas
- `id_asb_lantai` (number[]): Array of floor type IDs
- `id_asb_fungsi_ruang` (number[]): Array of room function IDs

**Optional Fields:**
- `id_asb_bipek_standard` (number[]): Array of standard bipek IDs
- `id_asb_bipek_nonstd` (number[]): Array of non-standard bipek IDs
- `id_asb_klasifikasi` (number): Classification ID

Store BPS (Bipek Standard) data. Updates status to 3. OPD users can only update their own data. Requires OPD, ADMIN, or SUPERADMIN role.

**Required Fields:**
- `id_asb` (number): ASB ID
- `komponen_std` (number[]): Array of standard component IDs
- `bobot_std` (number[]): Array of standard weights (must match length of komponen_std)

Store BPNS (Bipek Non-Standard) data. Updates status to 4. OPD users can only update their own data. Requires OPD, ADMIN, or SUPERADMIN role.

**Required Fields:**
- `id_asb` (number): ASB ID
- `komponen_nonstd` (number[]): Array of non-standard component IDs
- `bobot_nonstd` (number[]): Array of non-standard weights (must match length of komponen_nonstd)

Store rekening data. Updates status to 5. OPD users can only update their own data. Requires OPD, ADMIN, or SUPERADMIN role.

**Required Fields:**
- `id_asb` (number): ASB ID
- `id_rekening` (number): Rekening ID

Submit ASB for verification. Updates status to 5. OPD users can only submit their own data. Requires OPD, ADMIN, or SUPERADMIN role.

**Required Fields:**
- `id_asb` (number): ASB ID

item.description: Management operations for ASB - All endpoints require OPD, ADMIN, or SUPERADMIN role (except Update Index which also allows VERIFIKATOR)

item.name: ASB Verification (VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, SUPERADMIN)

request.description: Store penyesuaian konstruksi (perencanaan, pengawasan, management). Updates rekapitulasi_biaya_konstruksi and rekapitulasi_biaya_konstruksi_rounded from total_biaya_pembangunan + penyesuaian values. Requires OPD, ADMIN, or SUPERADMIN role.

Verify floor details. Updates status to 9. Requires VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, or SUPERADMIN role.

**Required Fields:**
- `id_asb` (number): ASB ID
- `verif_luas_lantai` (number[]): Array of verified floor areas
- `verif_id_asb_lantai` (number[]): Array of verified floor type IDs
- `verif_id_asb_fungsi_ruang` (number[]): Array of verified room function IDs

Verify BPS data. Updates status to 10. Requires VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, or SUPERADMIN role.

**Required Fields:**
- `id_asb` (number): ASB ID
- `verif_komponen_std` (number[]): Array of verified standard component IDs
- `verif_bobot_acuan_std` (number[]): Array of verified standard reference weights (must match length of verif_komponen_std)

Verify BPNS data. Updates status to 11. Requires VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, or SUPERADMIN role.

**Required Fields:**
- `id_asb` (number): ASB ID
- `verif_komponen_nonstd` (number[]): Array of verified non-standard component IDs
- `verif_bobot_acuan_nonstd` (number[]): Array of verified non-standard reference weights (must match length of verif_komponen_nonstd)

**Optional Fields:**
- `id_asb_bipek_nonstd` (number[]): Array of bipek non-standard IDs (internal use)

Verify rekening. Updates status to 12. Requires VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, or SUPERADMIN role.

**Required Fields:**
- `id_asb` (number): ASB ID
- `id_rekening_review` (number): Review rekening ID

Verify pekerjaan (construction work) data. Requires VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, or SUPERADMIN role.

**Required Fields:**
- `id_asb` (number): ASB ID
- `perencanaan_konstruksi` (number): Construction planning percentage
- `pengawasan_konstruksi` (number): Construction supervision percentage
- `management_konstruksi` (number): Construction management percentage

Final verification/approval of ASB. Updates status to 3 (Memenuhi Syarat). Requires VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, or SUPERADMIN role.

**Required Fields:**
- `id_asb` (number): ASB ID

Reject an ASB. Updates status to 4 (Tidak Memenuhi Syarat). Can only be done during verification stages. Requires VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, or SUPERADMIN role.

**Required Fields:**
- `id_asb` (number): ASB ID
- `reject_reason` (string): Reason for rejection

item.description: Verification endpoints for ASB - All require VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, or SUPERADMIN role

item.name: ASB Document

request.description: Get all ASB documents with pagination. Requires SUPERADMIN role.
Get a specific ASB document by ID. Requires SUPERADMIN role.
Get documents filtered by specification type. Requires SUPERADMIN role.

Upload a new ASB document. Requires SUPERADMIN role.

**Form Data:**
- `file` (file): Document file to upload
- `idAsb` (number): ASB ID
- `spec` (string): Document specification type (e.g., SURAT_PERMOHONAN)

Update an existing ASB document. Requires SUPERADMIN role.

**Form Data:**
- `id` (number, required): Document ID
- `file` (file, optional): New document file
- `spec` (string, optional): New document specification type

Delete an ASB document. Requires SUPERADMIN role.

**Required Fields:**
- `id` (number): Document ID

item.description: Endpoints for managing ASB documents (uploads, updates, deletions) - All require SUPERADMIN role

item.name: ASB Lantai

request.description: Get all ASB lantai (floor types) with pagination. Requires SUPERADMIN role.
Get a specific ASB lantai by ID. Requires SUPERADMIN role.

Create a new ASB lantai (floor type). Requires SUPERADMIN role.

**Required Fields:**
- `lantai` (string): Floor type name

Update an existing ASB lantai. Requires SUPERADMIN role.

**Required Fields:**
- `id` (number): Lantai ID
- `lantai` (string): Floor type name

Delete an ASB lantai. Requires SUPERADMIN role.

**Required Fields:**
- `id` (number): Lantai ID

item.description: Endpoints for managing ASB lantai (floor types) master data - All require SUPERADMIN role
